---
name: Propose a topic
about: Suggest a technical point to discuss at the next eDNA Student Hub session

---

**What's the topic?**
A short description of the technical point (algorithm, protocol step, field question...).

**Which stage does it relate to?**
<!-- fieldwork / lab work / bioinformatics / reference database / stats & graphs -->

**Why is it worth discussing?**
What would the group learn or unblock by talking about this.

**Format suggestion (optional)**
<!-- e.g. short presentation, open discussion, live troubleshooting -->
